div.small: Manage your personal information and settings

ul.class: nav nav-pills nav-fill p-2 rounded shadow-sm

a.t-attf-class: nav-link rounded ess-portal-nav {{'active fw-bold' if section == 'personal' else ''}}
nav-link rounded ess-portal-nav {{'active fw-bold' if section == 'experience' else ''}}
nav-link rounded ess-portal-nav {{'active fw-bold' if section == 'certification' else ''}}
nav-link rounded ess-portal-nav {{'active fw-bold' if section == 'bank' else ''}}
nav-link rounded ess-portal-nav {{'active fw-bold' if section == 'orgchart' else ''}}

label.span: Disclaimer: I confirm the information I have updated is accurate and complete. I consent to its use for employment administration and legal compliance.
